description: Aazhi IP Library — curated open-source RTL IP cores for FPGA and ASIC design

ips.name: UART (Universal Asynchronous Receiver/Transmitter)
ips.description: AXI4-Stream UART transmitter and receiver. Configurable baud rate via prescaler, configurable data width. Supports overrun and frame error detection on RX.
ips.author: Alex Forencich

ips.name: SPI Master Controller
ips.description: SPI master supporting all four SPI modes (CPOL/CPHA 0-3). Parametric word width and clock divider. Assert din_valid to start a transfer; done pulses when complete.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: I2C Master Controller
ips.description: Full-featured I2C master with AXI4-Stream command and data interface. Supports repeated starts, multi-byte transfers, clock stretching, and missed-ACK detection.
ips.author: Alex Forencich

ips.name: Synchronous FIFO
ips.description: Single-clock-domain FIFO with parameterized width and depth. Uses dual-pointer Gray-free binary scheme. Provides full, empty, and count outputs.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: Asynchronous FIFO (Dual-Clock)
ips.description: Dual-clock-domain FIFO for safe clock-domain crossing. Uses Gray-code pointers and 2-flip-flop synchronizers to safely cross the pointer between domains.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: VGA Controller (640×480 @ 60 Hz)
ips.description: Standard 640×480 @ 60 Hz VGA sync generator. Outputs hsync, vsync, horizontal/vertical pixel counters, and display_on flag. Connect pixel RGB data when display_on is high.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: PWM Generator
ips.description: Simple pulse-width modulator. Counter-compare approach with parameterizable resolution. Useful for motor control, LED dimming, and DAC approximation.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: Button Debouncer
ips.description: Debounces mechanical buttons or any noisy digital signal. Input must remain stable for STABLE_COUNT clock cycles before the output is updated. Essential for any design with physical buttons.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: LFSR Pseudo-Random Number Generator
ips.description: Maximal-length Galois LFSR for pseudo-random bit and word generation. Supports widths 8, 16, and 32 with built-in optimal taps. Period = 2^WIDTH - 1.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors

ips.name: Integer Clock Divider
ips.description: Divides an input clock by any even integer ≥ 2. Output maintains 50% duty cycle. Useful when a PLL/MMCM is unavailable or overkill for simple frequency division.
ips.author: aazhi-ip-lib contributors
